name: part_005
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_005.mov

scenes.description: Performance of the song "イケナイ太陽" (Ikenai Taiyou).

subtitles.original: 濡れた髪を撫でた そしてAh
subtitles.english: I stroked your wet hair, and then... Ah

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない
subtitles.english: ABC, it's not going on

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: That's not good enough, is it?

subtitles.original: だってココロの奥は違うんじゃない
subtitles.english: Because deep in your heart, it's different, isn't it?

subtitles.original: オレの青春そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth is more than just that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to burn out deep inside

subtitles.original: きっとキミじゃなきゃヤダよ
subtitles.english: It definitely has to be you

subtitles.original: オレはイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: Ah 赤い糸なんておとぎ話
subtitles.english: Ah, the red thread of fate is just a fairy tale

subtitles.original: でもしたごころでさえ信じたいの
subtitles.english: But I want to believe even in ulterior motives

subtitles.original: オレは正しい キミも正しい
subtitles.english: I'm right, and you're right too

subtitles.original: とにかくもう左右されないぜ
subtitles.english: Anyway, I won't be swayed anymore

subtitles.original: 騙し騙され胸うずく
subtitles.english: Deceiving and being deceived, my heart aches

subtitles.original: 芝居だより盛り上げるよ
subtitles.english: I'll liven things up with a performance

subtitles.original: 吐息が耳に触れた二人 Ah
subtitles.english: Our breaths touched each other's ears, Ah

subtitles.original: ABC 続かない
subtitles.english: ABC, it's not going on

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: That's not good enough, is it?

subtitles.original: だってココロの奥は違うんじゃない
subtitles.english: Because deep in your heart, it's different, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 私の青春そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth is more than just that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to burn out deep inside

subtitles.original: きっとキミじゃなきゃヤダよ
subtitles.english: It definitely has to be you

subtitles.original: 私イケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 交わす言葉の記憶遠く 口元の動きに揺れ動く
subtitles.english: The memories of words shared are distant, swaying to the movement of our lips

subtitles.original: 濡れた髪を撫でた そしてAh
subtitles.english: I stroked your wet hair, and then... Ah

subtitles.original: ABC... ABC 続かない
subtitles.english: ABC... ABC, it's not going on

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃダメじゃない
subtitles.english: That's not good enough, is it?

subtitles.original: だってココロの奥は違うんじゃない
subtitles.english: Because deep in your heart, it's different, isn't it?

subtitles.original: オレの青春そんなもんじゃない
subtitles.english: My youth is more than just that

subtitles.original: 熱く奥で果てたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to burn out deep inside

subtitles.original: きっとキミじゃなきゃヤダよ
subtitles.english: It definitely has to be you

subtitles.original: オレはイケナイ太陽
subtitles.english: I'm the naughty sun

subtitles.original: 絡み合う糸はキミと
subtitles.english: The threads intertwining are with you

subtitles.original: オレをむすぶ赤い糸
subtitles.english: The red thread that binds me

subtitles.original: はぁ〜、はぁ〜。みんな、来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: *panting* Thank you all for coming!

subtitles.original: ということで、お友達が来てくれたので、せっかくなので自己紹介してもらおうと思います！
subtitles.english: So, since my friends are here, I'd like to have them introduce themselves!

subtitles.original: まずはプルルちゃんから！
subtitles.english: First, Pururu-chan!

subtitles.original: はーい！
subtitles.english: Hi!

subtitles.original: 天使と悪魔のプルプルエンジェルデビル、甘噛プルルです！
subtitles.english: I'm the angel and demon Purupuru Angel-Devil, Amagami Pururu!

subtitles.original: アキロゼ〜、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Akirose, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！いや〜とっても楽しかったですね！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Man, that was really fun!

subtitles.original: 最高！そして続いてカルビちゃーん！
subtitles.english: Awesome! Next, Karubi-chan!

subtitles.original: はい！お肉の国のお姫様、赤見カルビです！
subtitles.english: Hi! I'm the princess of the Kingdom of Meat, Akami Karubi!

subtitles.original: アキロゼ、誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Akirose, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: いいライブって、友達とのライブ初めてだからさ、マジで嬉しかったよ。本当に呼んでくれて、またやろうぜ！
subtitles.english: This is a great live show. It's my first time performing with friends, so I'm really happy. Thanks for inviting me. Let's do it again!

subtitles.original: またやろう！素晴らしい！そして最後に、ずずさん！
subtitles.english: Let's! Wonderful! And finally, Zuzu-san!

subtitles.original: はーい！僕のこと知らない人いると思うんで自己紹介だけさせてください！
subtitles.english: Hi! I think some people might not know me, so let me just introduce myself!

subtitles.original: 雨降ってザーザー 症状事態はG.G. オレの名前は Z.Z.Z.Z. ずずでございます！
subtitles.english: Rain falling za-za, my condition is G.G., my name is Z-Z-Z-Z Zuzu!

subtitles.original: いや、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Anyway, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!
